htmlMain:
New Membership Application
Raleigh Hills Business Association
A registered 501 c 6 non profit organization
www.RaleighHillsBusinessAssn.org
RHBA Membership consists of all business entities & individuals who own business property or who operate a business within the Raleigh Hills area. All other business entities & individuals who have a substantial interest in the Raleigh Hills business community may become members of the organization.
RALEIGH HILLS BUSINESS ASSOCIATION MEMBER BENEFITS — All Members receive:
Free listing on the RHBA Website
Free listing in the printed directory and copies of the directory
Priority invitations to RHBA Events and Meetings
Free business promotions for your business events
Opportunities to connect with your community on a deeper level.

Voting rights at Annual business meeting in May
